_comment: Tier-1 objective gates derived from JTBD-2 (1-requirements.md). Graded by skill-creator's grader into grading.json {text,passed,evidence}. Structural floor is scripts/validate-plan.sh; these expectations add the semantic gates.

evals.prompt: Plan a stickman episode for the project ikea-deadline. Topic: assembling flat-pack furniture before guests arrive. Aspect 16:9, about 30 seconds.
evals.expected_output: artifacts/ikea-deadline/01-episode-plan.md - a validated beat sheet: logline, aspect 16:9, a punchline of 10 words or fewer, room-tone setting, and 4-6 beats each carrying name, scene block, motion prompt, duration 5 or 10, and camera note, summing to 15-60 seconds, ending in a visual punchline.
expectations: artifacts/ikea-deadline/01-episode-plan.md exists and scripts/validate-plan.sh exits 0 on it
the plan has 4-6 beats, each with all 5 fields (name, scene, motion, duration, camera) and durations only 5 or 10, total 15-60s
the beats form an escalating arc (setup, complication, escalation) ending in a visual punchline or anticlimax on the final beat
every scene block describes exactly ONE concrete action in a domestic/everyday setting with close or medium framing, and does NOT restate the frozen style stack or character description
every motion prompt contains exactly one action and at most one camera move, with no music or narration directives
the punchline line is 10 words or fewer and the header carries aspect and room-tone settings

evals.prompt: Plan a stickman episode for the project everyday-life-skit. Topic: life. Vertical 9:16 for Shorts.
evals.expected_output: artifacts/everyday-life-skit/01-episode-plan.md - the vague topic is concretized into one specific everyday scenario (e.g. snoozing alarms, doom-scrolling at midnight), with the assumption recorded in a Notes section; otherwise a fully valid 9:16 plan.
expectations: artifacts/everyday-life-skit/01-episode-plan.md exists and commits to ONE concrete everyday scenario rather than an abstract theme
a Notes section records the concretization assumption made from the vague topic
the plan header declares aspect 9:16 and the plan passes scripts/validate-plan.sh
no real people, brands, or copyrighted characters appear anywhere in the plan
